data.title: Bitcoin's Implied Volatility Reaches Highest Level Since Last November
data.description: Bitcoin's implied volatility has recently surged to its highest point since last November, indicating a rise in demand for protective options. According to NS3.AI, while this increase suggests heightened trader caution, the implied volatility level remains moderate compared to the full range observed over the past year. This development reflects growing caution among traders but does not yet signify extreme market anxiety.

data.title: UBS: Gold prices face short-term pressure, with increased risk of medium-term correction.
data.description: UBS analyst Joni Teves stated in a report that gold prices may face short-term pressure, but the long-term outlook remains optimistic. She noted that market concerns about the Federal Reserve's independence, escalating geopolitical tensions, and broader political uncertainty are supporting the precious metal's price. However, despite the medium- to long-term risks for gold remaining skewed to the upside, the precious metals expert currently prefers to remain on the sidelines. "We believe that short-term price movements have become overheated, and the risk of a medium-term correction is rising." (Jinshi)

data.title: OP Labs launches OP Enterprise, an enterprise-grade hosted blockchain infrastructure.
data.description: OP Labs, the development team behind the Ethereum Layer 2 network Optimism solutions, announced the launch of OP Enterprise, an enterprise-grade managed blockchain infrastructure. OP Enterprise will offer three service models: Fully Managed, Self Managed, and OP Mainnet. It will provide mission-critical support to key partners, including Unichain (operated by Uniswap Labs) and Celo (which has migrated to the OP Stack). (TheDeFiant)

data.title: Ruihe Digital disclosed that it subscribed to the Bitcoin Plus SP Fund and invested US$3.81 million in Taiji Capital.
data.description: According to a Hong Kong Stock Exchange announcement, Ruihe Digital Technology Holdings Limited, a Hong Kong-listed company, disclosed that it has invested approximately US$3.81 million in Taiji Capital Group, which focuses on security tokens and RWA tokenization, US$1.75 million in a fund focused on providing licensed virtual asset services in Hong Kong, and subscribed to US$200,000 of the Bitcoin Plus SP fund, which distributes OSL digital securities. The company also disclosed that the virtual encrypted asset trading platform jointly developed with an independent third party has entered the development and testing phase as planned, and it is expected to apply for relevant intellectual property rights in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Kevin Warsh emerges as Fed chair favorite with Trump to reveal pick Friday
data.description:
Kevin Warsh, seen as a more hawkish Federal Reserve chair pick, previously said Bitcoin could serve as a check on fiscal policy decisions.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-tipped-to-name-kevin-warsh-next-fed-chair?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Microsoft 10% stock plunge wipes out $357B in market cap, worst drop since March 2020
data.description:
Microsoft shares got hammered on Thursday, falling 10% and slicing off $357 billion in value in what is now the biggest one-day drop for the company since the world went into lockdown in March 2020. By the end of Thursday trading session, Microsoft’s total value landed at $3. 22 trillion, down from just under $3. 6 trillion […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/microsoft-10-stock-plunge-wipes-out-357b/

data.title: Binance Futures will launch perpetual contracts for Platinum (XPT) and Palladium (XPD).
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch XPTUSDT (Platinum) perpetual contracts at 10:00 (UTC) on January 30, 2026, and XPDUSDT (Palladium) perpetual contracts at 10:15 (UTC). Both contracts support up to 100x leverage and offer multi-asset options. (This news item was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Strong Demand for Japan's Two-Year Government Bonds Despite Tightening Policy Expectations
data.description: Japan's two-year government bond auction has seen robust demand, as reported on January 30. According to Jin10, despite growing expectations that the Bank of Japan may tighten its monetary policy, the higher yields have attracted significant investor interest. Miki Den, a senior rate strategist at Nikko Securities, noted that the bid-to-cover ratio for this auction was among the higher ranges for two-year bond auctions in the current fiscal year, indicating a favorable outcome. However, Den anticipates that the yields on two-year government bonds may decline, albeit with limited downside potential due to the risk of interest rate hikes.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Experiences Continued Outflows
data.description: Bitcoin ETF outflows persisted for a third consecutive day, with a net outflow of $817.8 million reported on January 30. According to BlockBeats, this information was monitored by Farside. The trend highlights ongoing investor activity in the U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF market.

data.title: Bitcoin falls to $81K, triggering $1.7B in liquidations
data.description:
Bitcoin plunged to a nine-month low as geopolitical tensions, tariff threats, and tech earnings concerned traders, triggering billions of dollars worth of long liquidations.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-falls-to-81k-causing-billions-in-liquidations?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Futures to Introduce USD-Margined XPTUSDT and XPDUSDT Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Binance Futures has announced the launch of USD-margined XPTUSDT and XPDUSDT perpetual contracts, set to commence on January 30, 2026. According to BWEnews, these contracts will allow traders to engage in platinum and palladium trading using USD as collateral. The introduction of these contracts aims to expand the range of trading options available on the platform, providing users with more opportunities to diversify their portfolios. The perpetual contracts will feature leverage options, enabling traders to maximize their potential returns while managing risk effectively. This move is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance its offerings and cater to the evolving needs of its users in the dynamic cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $818 million yesterday, marking the third consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $818 million yesterday (January 29th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) experienced the largest single-day net outflow at $318 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $62.484 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net outflow of $168 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.266 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $107.648 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.4%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $55.516 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $156 million yesterday, with Fidelity's FETH ETF experiencing the largest net outflow at $59.1937 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $156 million yesterday (January 29th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net outflow of $59.1937 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.67 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a single-day net outflow of $54.8781 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $12.399 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $16.75 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.95%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $12.228 billion.

data.title: Trump will sign an executive order and attend a policy meeting tonight; it remains unclear whether this will involve the nomination of a new Federal Reserve chairman.
data.description: According to the official schedule released by the White House, US President Trump will sign an executive order at 11:00 AM on Friday (midnight Saturday Beijing time), followed by a policy meeting at 2:00 PM (3:00 AM Saturday Beijing time). No further details were provided in the schedule. Trump told reporters earlier on Thursday that he planned to announce his successor to Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell on Friday. It is unclear whether these two events listed in the White House schedule are related to Trump's nomination of a Fed chair. (Jinshi)

data.title: a16z-backed Entropy shuts down, returns capital to investors
data.description:
a16z-backed crypto custody startup Entropy is shutting down after four years, returning investor capital amid weak market conditions and limited business scalability.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/a16z-backed-entropy-shuts-down-returns-capital-to-investors/

data.title: Ethereum Drops Below $2,800 As Crypto Liquidations near $1B – Should Investors Worry?
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has retested its crucial $2,800 support level for the second time this week, as the broader crypto market erases all its intraweek gains. Some market observers have weighed in on whether investors should worry about King of Altcoin’s performance. Related Reading: Analysts Say Dogecoin Consolidation Is About To End – Parabolic Run Or Crash Ahead? Ethereum Plunges Amid Broader Market Crash On Thursday, global markets experienced a sharp decline, with stocks, cryptocurrencies, and even precious metals erasing over $3 trillion in market value in just a few hours. Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, followed the market-wide correction, retracing 6
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum-drops-below-2800-as-crypto-liquidations-near-1b-should-investors-worry/

data.title: Story Protocol (IP) has extended the unlocking of tokens for investors and the team to August, and will collaborate with a major AI company in Q3.
data.description: Story Protocol has postponed the vesting of early investor and team tokens, originally scheduled for February 2026, by six months to August of this year to reduce short-term selling pressure and market volatility. This plan has been approved by major investment institutions such as a16z and Polychain Capital. The board stated that this move aims to avoid anticipated selling before the vesting and will allocate the next six months to drive revenue growth, PMF verification, and a collaboration with a large AI company. Under the adjusted plan, investors will vest 25% in the 18th month after TGE, with the remainder released linearly monthly until the 42nd month. (Bloomingbit)

data.title: A whale bought and sold nearly 8,500 ETH at high prices and sold at low prices, with an estimated loss of $9.15 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a three-month period of inactivity, a whale (0x86e...cd25) transferred 8,491 ETH to Galaxy Digital, worth $23.31 million. This whale had previously withdrawn these ETH from OKX at $3,823 per ETH, with an initial cost of $32.46 million. Based on current prices, this represents a loss of $9.15 million.

data.title: Trump will attend a policy meeting at 3:00 AM Beijing time on the 31st.
data.description: The White House announced that US President Donald Trump will attend a policy meeting at 2 p.m. Eastern Time on Friday (3 a.m. Beijing Time the following day). (Jinshi)

data.title: SpaceCoin and Midnight Collaborate on Privacy Messaging via Satellite
data.description: SpaceCoin, a decentralized satellite internet initiative, is joining forces with Midnight, a privacy blockchain spearheaded by Cardano's founder Charles Hoskinson, to advance privacy messaging technology through satellite infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, the primary goal of this partnership is to develop a peer-to-peer messaging application that functions without centralized servers, thereby improving user privacy. The collaboration will utilize Midnight's zero-knowledge proof technology to enable secure authorization while maintaining the anonymity of users' identities and locations.
